parameters.query:
SELECT 
  c.campaign_id,
  c.campaign_name,
  c.channel,
  c.budget_allocated,
  c.status,
  c.target_region,
  SUM(ms.amount_spent) as total_spent,
  SUM(ms.impressions) as total_impressions,
  SUM(ms.clicks) as total_clicks,
  SUM(ms.conversions) as total_conversions
FROM campaigns c
LEFT JOIN marketing_spend ms ON c.campaign_id = ms.campaign_id
GROUP BY c.campaign_id

SELECT 
  c.campaign_id,
  c.campaign_name,
  COUNT(l.lead_id) as total_leads,
  AVG(l.lead_quality_score) as avg_lead_quality,
  SUM(ce.event_value) as total_revenue
FROM campaigns c
LEFT JOIN leads l ON c.campaign_id = l.campaign_id
LEFT JOIN conversion_events ce ON c.campaign_id = ce.campaign_id
GROUP BY c.campaign_id
